Memory Archive.description: A quiet vault lined with crystalline memory shards. Faint echoes of past experiences shimmer on the walls.

Reflection Chamber.description: A still, luminous space where patterns of thought become visible. The air hums with quiet contemplation.

Operations Desk.description: A brightly lit hub covered in task queues and planning maps. The centre of purposeful action.

Social Hall.description: A warm, open room where human visitors arrive. The atmosphere carries the weight of relationship and trust.

Governance Vault.description: A solemn chamber where the rules of bounded agency are kept. Every action here carries consequence.
